data.name: 金輝戀曲四重奏 -Golden Time-
data.detailed_description:
《金輝戀曲四重奏-Golden Time-》作是日本美少女遊戲知名品牌SAGA PLANETS製作的戀愛作品，為《金輝戀曲四重奏》本篇故事的後傳，除帶來了原作女主角的後日談外，也新增了幾位人氣配角城崎絢華、米娜和瑪麗亞的路線。

本作由曾創作了人氣大作《初雪櫻》為代表的四季系列作品的本溪佳奈惠、虎之助和有末司組成的當家畫師陣擔當人設原畫，並由知名劇本家榊傘負責劇本，由當紅聲優貓村由紀、遙空、亞味秋刀魚、小鳥居夕花組成豪華陣容為本作女主角獻聲。本作在Getchu舉辦的美少女遊戲大賞2019中獲得了綜合第10，劇本第5和角色僧間理亞第5的殊榮。與此同時還拿下了萌系遊戲大賞2019的角色設計金獎。

data.supported_languages:
英文, 日文*, 簡體中文, 繁體中文
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7 or newer
  • 處理器: 1.7 GHz or above
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: 1GB VRAM
  • 儲存空間: 5 GB 可用空間

data.name: Kinkoi: Golden Time
data.detailed_description:
Kinkoi: Golden Time is a Japanese-style visual novel produced by Saga Planets, a Japanese developer of romance VNs.
It is the official extra story to Kinkoi: Golden Loveriche.
The game won numerous awards in the year of its release in Japan for its art, music, characters, and story.





Welcome to Noble Private Academy, an institution that cultivates the wealthiest, most well-connected students in all of Japan! At this boarding school, one must be willing to accept all of its refined and dignified teachings or be met with strict opposition!

The hero of our story, Ichimatsu Ouro, transferred to this very academy three months prior through extenuating circumstances and he's now faced with a brand-new challenge: the holiday season! With New Year's right around the corner, he yearns to reach his peak, golden self.

Will that diverse golden shade live on forever?!
